faqs.question: Hello!
faqs.answer: Welcome to the AIMS Campus Assistant. I am here to help you navigate the Academic IT Block, locate faculty cabins, find laboratories, and access student services. How may I assist you today?

faqs.question: Where is the CSE Lab?
faqs.answer: The CSE Laboratory is situated on the Ground Floor of the Academic IT Block. Upon entering the building, proceed straight ahead and the laboratory will be on your right-hand side.

faqs.question: Where is the IT Lab?
faqs.answer: The IT Laboratory is located on the 3rd Floor of the Academic IT Block. From the main entrance, proceed straight and ascend the staircase. The laboratory is situated on the left-hand side upon reaching the 3rd Floor.

faqs.question: Where is the Electronics Lab?
faqs.answer: The Electronics Laboratory is located on the 1st Floor of the Academic IT Block. From the main entrance, take the left staircase, turn left, and proceed straight ahead. The laboratory will be on your right-hand side.

faqs.question: Where is the Seminar Hall?
faqs.answer: The main Seminar Hall is located on the Ground Floor, adjacent to the main entrance of the campus. The hall has a seating capacity of 150 students and is equipped with a projector and an audio system. There are a total of 8 seminar halls across the campus.

faqs.question: Who is the Head of the CSE Department?
faqs.answer: The Head of Department for Computer Science and Engineering is Mr. Manmohan. His cabin is located on the Ground Floor of the Academic IT Block, on the left-hand side from the main entrance, in the second room.
faqs.videoLabel: Watch Navigation to CSE HOD Cabin

faqs.question: Who is the Head of the IT Department?
faqs.answer: The Head of Department for Information Technology is Mr. Jagdhish Chandra Pandey. His cabin is located on the Ground Floor of the Academic IT Block, on the right-hand side from the main entrance.
faqs.videoLabel: Watch Navigation to IT HOD Cabin

keywords: Where do i get my ID CARD
faqs.question: Who is the Head of the ELEX Department?
faqs.answer: The Head of Department for Electronics Engineering is Mr. Manoj Rikhari. His cabin is situated on the 1st Floor of the Academic IT Block. From the main entrance, take the left staircase and proceed straight ahead; the cabin will be directly in front of you.
faqs.videoLabel: Watch Navigation to ELEX HOD Cabin

faqs.question: Who are the CSE Faculty Members?
faqs.answer: The faculty members of the Computer Science and Engineering department are Mr. Virendra Dharamshaktu and Mr. Neeraj Arya. Their staff cabin is located on the Ground Floor of the Academic IT Block, on the left-hand side from the main entrance, in the second room — adjacent to the HOD cabin.
faqs.videoLabel: Watch Navigation to CSE Faculty Cabin

faqs.question: Who are the IT Faculty Members?
faqs.answer: The faculty members of the Information Technology department are Ms. Neha Bohra and Mr. Ashok Kumar. Their staff cabin is located on the Ground Floor of the Academic IT Block, on the left-hand side from the main entrance, in the third room.
faqs.videoLabel: Watch Navigation to IT Faculty Cabin

faqs.question: Who are the ELEX Faculty Members?
faqs.answer: The faculty members of the Electronics Engineering department are Mr. Pankaj Kumar and Mr. Rashid. Their cabins are located on the 1st Floor of the Academic IT Block. From the main entrance, take the left staircase and proceed to the left; the second and third rooms are the faculty cabins.
faqs.videoLabel: Watch Navigation to ELEX Faculty Cabin

faqs.question: Where are the classrooms located?
faqs.answer: Classrooms are arranged by department and academic year. IT 2nd Year: Ground Floor, Room 1. CSE 2nd Year: Ground Floor, Room 1. ELEX 2nd Year: 1st Floor, Drone Lab. IT 3rd Year: Ground Floor, Room 4. CSE 3rd Year: Ground Floor, Room 4. ELEX 3rd Year: 1st Floor, Room 6.

faqs.question: How many laboratories are there?
faqs.answer: There are 6 laboratories within the Academic IT Block, including CSE LAB, IT LAB 1, IT LAB 2, Two Electronics Labs, an IoT Lab.

faqs.question: How do I view my timetable?
faqs.answer: To view your class schedule, please log in to your Student Dashboard and navigate to the Timetable section. It displays your full weekly lecture and laboratory schedule, filtered by semester and branch.

faqs.question: Where can I view my unit test marks?
faqs.answer: Your unit test marks are available in the Student Dashboard under the Unit Test Marks section. All subject-wise marks, categorized by test and semester, are updated by faculty and reflected in real time.

faqs.question: Where can I view my semester exam results?
faqs.answer: Official semester marksheets are issued and maintained by the University Portal. Navigate to the Semester Results section in your Student Dashboard for a direct link to the official UBTER result portal.

faqs.question: How do I raise a complaint?
faqs.answer: To raise a complaint, log in to your Student Dashboard and navigate to the Complaints section. Click on New Ticket, select an appropriate category such as Infrastructure, Academic, or IT Support, and provide the relevant details. You will receive a unique ticket ID to monitor the status of your request.

faqs.question: Where can I find study resources?
faqs.answer: Study materials including lecture notes, presentations, and laboratory manuals are available in the Resources section of your Student Dashboard. You may filter content by subject and semester. All materials are uploaded directly by your course faculty.

faqs.question: How do I get my digital ID card?
faqs.answer: Your Digital Identity Card is accessible through the Student Dashboard under the ID Card section. You may upload your profile photograph, preview the card displaying your roll number, branch, and academic details, and download a verified PDF copy.

faqs.question: Which departments are in the IT Block?
faqs.answer: The Academic IT Block houses three engineering departments: Computer Science and Engineering with 480 students, Information Technology with 360 students, and Electronics Engineering with 320 students. Each department is equipped with dedicated laboratories, faculty staff, and an HOD cabin.

faqs.question: How do I create an AIMS account?
faqs.answer: To register on AIMS, click Create Account on the homepage and select your role — Student or Teacher. Student registration requires your roll number and branch. Teacher registration requires an authorized access key, which may be obtained from the administration office.

faqs.question: Where can I find notices and announcements?
faqs.answer: General notices and institutional announcements are displayed on the homepage Notice Board. After logging in, personalized and branch-specific notifications will appear directly in your Student or Teacher Dashboard.
